admin.title: Admin
admin.userManagementDesc: Manage user roles and permissions. Changes take effect immediately and affect the user's access scope.
admin.platformManagementDesc: Configure available social platforms. Disabling a platform will stop data collection for that platform.
admin.dataCollectionDesc: Set collection frequency, target scope, and data retention periods. Changes apply from the next collection cycle.
admin.aiAnalysisDesc: Manage AI model settings and analysis scope. Model changes apply to new data only.
admin.aiPromptsDesc: View and manage prompt templates used for AI analysis.
admin.aiLogsDesc: View AI request history, token usage, and cost tracking.
admin.aiEvalsDesc: Evaluate and monitor AI analysis result quality.
admin.planManagementDesc: Plan changes take effect from the next billing date. Downgrading may limit some features.
admin.systemLogsDesc: View system activity logs. Logs are retained for 90 days.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Get a bird's-eye view of all your channels' performance and key metrics.
dashboard.guide: Hover over any metric card to see a detailed explanation.
dashboard.channelPerformanceDesc: Track views, engagement, and follower changes over the past 6 months.
dashboard.contentTypeDistDesc: Compare views across different content formats.
dashboard.countryPerformanceDesc: Compare views and engagement rates by country.
dashboard.aiInsightsDesc: AI-generated performance summaries and strategic recommendations.

channels.title: Channel Analysis
channels.description: Analyze performance and growth trends of your registered social channels.
channels.guide: Add a channel to start tracking subscribers, views, engagement rates, and other key metrics.
channels.emptyDescription:
Register your first channel to start
analyzing social media performance.
We support YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more.
channels.searchPlaceholder: Search channels by name, URL, or tags...

channelDetail.contentPerformanceDesc: Compare recent content performance and identify improvement opportunities.
channelDetail.channelInsightsDesc: AI-analyzed channel status and strategic recommendations.
channelDetail.risksAndActionsDesc: Identify urgent risk signals and actionable next steps.
channelDetail.commentAnalysisCtaDesc: View sentiment analysis, risk signals, and suggested replies for this channel's comments.

channelNew.title: Add Channel
channelNew.description: Register a social media channel for analysis.
channelNew.guide:
Enter a channel URL and we'll auto-detect the platform,
verify the profile, and start analysis.

comments.title: Comment Analysis
comments.description: Unified analysis across all channels. Prioritize responses by sentiment, risk level, and topic.
comments.guide: High-risk comments are highlighted in red. Click any comment to view detailed analysis and suggested replies.
comments.emptyDescription:
Register a channel and comments will be automatically collected
with sentiment analysis, topic classification, and risk assessment.

competitors.title: Competitive Analysis
competitors.description: Compare performance with competitor channels and find differentiation opportunities.
competitors.guide: Add competitor channels to compare subscriber growth, engagement rates, and content strategies.
competitors.emptyDescription:
Add competitor channels to get
performance comparisons and differentiation insights.

contents.title: Content Management
contents.description: Manage and compare content performance across all channels in one place.
contents.guide: Compare views, engagement rates, and comments per content to build your optimal content strategy.
contents.emptyDescription: No contents found from registered channels. Please register channels and collect data.

keywords.title: Keywords & Trends
keywords.description: Track search volume and trends for brand-related keywords.
keywords.guide: Register keywords to analyze search trends, competitive intensity, and related keywords.
keywords.emptyDescription:
Register keywords to start
monitoring real-time trends and competitive landscape.

insights.title: Insights & Reports
insights.description: View AI-generated strategic insights and actionable recommendations.
insights.guide: Insights become more accurate as more data is collected.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your current subscription plan and payment history.
billing.guide: Plan changes take effect from the next billing date.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage account, workspace, notification, and other preferences.

onboarding.title: Getting Started
onboarding.subtitle: Start your social media analytics journey with X2
onboarding.step1Desc: Register URLs of social media channels you want to analyze. We support YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X, and more.
onboarding.step2Desc: Add brand-related keywords to track real-time trends and mentions.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add competitor channels to compare performance and build differentiation strategies.
onboarding.step4Desc: All data is consolidated in your dashboard for key insights at a glance.

tooltips.subscribers: Total subscribers for this channel. Change rate vs. previous period is also shown.
tooltips.totalViews: Cumulative views across all content on this channel.
tooltips.engagementRate: Ratio of reactions (likes, comments, shares) to views. Higher rates indicate stronger audience interest.
tooltips.growthRate: Subscriber (or follower) change rate over the last 30 days. Indicates channel growth velocity.
tooltips.uploads30d: Number of content pieces uploaded in the last 30 days. Consistent uploads improve algorithmic visibility.
tooltips.sentiment: Comment sentiment classification into positive, neutral, or negative. AI automatically analyzes comment content.
tooltips.riskLevel: Indicates comment risk level. Higher scores for negative language, complaints, or aggressive content.
tooltips.topicLabel: Auto-classified comment topic. Categories include price, quality, schedule, inquiry, and more.
